title: Pterophylla lucida
taxonomy: Pterophylla lucida is a species of insect, specifically a katydid, and it belongs to the family Tettigoniidae. This katydid is found in North America, and its classification is further detailed as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Arthropoda, Class: Insecta, Order: Orthoptera, Family: Tettigoniidae, Genus: Pterophylla, Species: P. lucida. The classification of Pterophylla lucida reflects its evolutionary relationships and characteristics. Within the family Tettigoniidae, Pterophylla lucida is a distinct species with unique features. Its classification also allows for the identification and study of its behavior, habitat, and other biological aspects.
